pii.description: Company contact PII managed by TCRN PII Platform

reason.description: Operator-entered audit reason for a webhook test delivery or replay.
reason.example: Validate endpoint readiness after rotating the receiver secret.

dryRun.description: When true, records outbox and attempt state without outbound HTTP dispatch.

sampleEventCode.description: TCRN-owned event code used for a dry-run test payload.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key. Duplicate keys for the same operation return the existing outbox result; keys already used for a different operation return 409 RES_CONFLICT.

action.description: Action to check. Aliases create/update/export are normalized to write/write/execute.

checks.description: List of permission checks to perform
